{{Quote|Good to see another soldier joining the fray. We sure could use you. If you're a pilot, I need your assistance. Since we've maintained control of the Corellia system, the Imperial Navy is making another push. They are bringing in fighters from other parts of the galaxy for a massive fleet attack. Your mission, if you accept, will be to destroy 15 TIEs in the Yavin system.|Lieutenant Grollo to a Rebel|<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>}}
'''Grollo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She participated in the [[Battle of Restuss]] on [[Rori/Legends|Rori]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] and gave orders to participating [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] to aid with the war in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] and hunt down [[TIE series/Legends|TIE fighters]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Grollo was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
